text: 🇬🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 UK Prime Minister: We do not support the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz and will not enter any war (with Iran) under any pressure
text_zh: 🇬🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 英国首相：我们不支持封锁霍尔木兹海峡，也不会在任何压力下卷入（与伊朗的）战争

text: German Chancellor Merz on Hungary election results: I am personally very grateful and relieved about this clear election result in Hungary. This shows that our democratic societies are more resilient than many believe. Our democracies can withstand Russian propaganda and foreign interference. Right-wing populism suffered a heavy defeat in Hungary. A clear signal has come from Hungary against right-wing populism worldwide.
text_zh: 德国总理默茨谈匈牙利选举结果：我个人对匈牙利这次明确的选举结果感到非常感激和欣慰。这表明我们的民主社会比许多人认为的更具韧性。我们的民主制度能够抵御俄罗斯的宣传和外国干涉。右翼民粹主义在匈牙利遭受了惨重失败。匈牙利向全世界发出了反对右翼民粹主义的明确信号。

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: The effort to expand territory has always been one of Israel’s objectives. It was waiting for an opportunity to implement this, and after October 2023 it saw that such an opportunity had opened up. Essentially, Israel is not pursuing security, but rather more territory. It presents this expansionism under the guise of security needs. As this becomes more exposed, international awareness grows, and the political rhetoric surrounding the issue begins to shift and produce different effects.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：扩张领土一直是以色列的目标之一。它一直在等待机会来实现这一目标，2023年10月之后，它看到了这样的机会。本质上，以色列追求的不是安全，而是更多的领土。它以安全需求为幌子来展示这种扩张主义。随着这一点越来越暴露，国际社会的意识也在增强，围绕该问题的政治言论开始发生转变并产生不同的影响。

text: Keir Starmer: Whatever the pressure, Britain will not be dragged into the Iran war. We’re not supporting the blockade.
text_zh: 基尔·斯塔默：无论压力如何，英国都不会被拖入伊朗战争。我们不支持封锁。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 IDF spokesperson Avichay Adrae released a statement: Israeli forces from the 98th Division have completed the encirclement of Bint Jbeil and begun an offensive operation inside the town. The statement said paratroopers, commando units, and the Givati Brigade are expanding ground operations to reinforce forward positions, claiming over 100 Hezbollah fighters were killed and multiple sites and weapons caches were destroyed. The IDF added that operations will continue against Hezbollah and that it will act to prevent threats to Israeli civilians. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列国防军发言人阿维查伊·阿德拉伊发表声明：以色列第98师已完成对宾特朱拜勒的包围，并开始在镇内进行进攻行动。声明称，伞兵、突击部队和吉瓦提旅正在扩大地面行动以加强前沿阵地，并声称已击毙100多名真主党武装人员，摧毁了多个地点和武器库。以军补充说，将继续针对真主党采取行动，并将采取行动防止对以色列平民的威胁。@wfwitness

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: When you look at the main topics currently under negotiation, it may not be technically realistic to expect them to be finalized and signed into a comprehensive agreement within 15 days. If the parties make good progress, an additional ceasefire period could come onto the agenda — perhaps 45 days or even 60 days — so that negotiations can continue and problems can be resolved during that time.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：当你审视目前正在谈判的主要议题时，在15天内完成并签署全面协议在技术上可能并不现实。如果各方取得良好进展，可能会将额外的停火期提上议程——也许是45天甚至60天——以便谈判能够继续，问题也能在此期间得到解决。

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ⚰️ ☠️ A pro-war Z-propagandist, Maksim Kalashnikov, described the battlefield as a “drone meat grinder” for Russian soldiers. 🔹 He effectively acknowledged that the value of an average Russian soldier is extremely low, contrasting recruitment promises of around 5 million rubles with the reality of being sent into high-risk “kill zones” where they are exposed to Ukrainian kamikaze drones. 🔹 According to this view, Russian commanders treat such losses as an acceptable and even “profitable” trade-off. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：⚰️ ☠️ 一位亲战的Z派宣传员马克西姆·卡拉什尼科夫将战场描述为俄罗斯士兵的“无人机绞肉机”。🔹 他实际上承认，普通俄罗斯士兵的价值极低，这与招募时承诺的约500万卢布形成了鲜明对比，现实是他们被送往高风险的“杀戮区”，暴露在乌克兰自杀式无人机之下。🔹 按照这种观点，俄罗斯指挥官将此类损失视为一种可接受甚至“有利可图”的权衡。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pope Leo XIV has departed Rome for Algeria, marking his first trip to Africa as pontiff. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043605721934139523/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 教皇利奥十四世已离开罗马前往阿尔及利亚，这是他作为教皇首次出访非洲。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043605721934139523/video/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical In a new statement, Iran's military command threatens the seaports of Gulf countries in response to the US blockade. "The security of ports in the Persian Gulf and the Sea of ​​Oman is either for everyone or for no one." tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 在一份新声明中，伊朗军事指挥部威胁称，作为对美国封锁的回应，将针对海湾国家的港口。“波斯湾和阿曼海港口的安全要么属于所有人，要么谁也不属于。” 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @JustinTrudeau : Hungarians voted for change and a renewed commitment to democratic institutions after years of erosion under Viktor Orbán. A powerful and positive signal to democracies around the world that citizens can reclaim institutions and restore respect for rights. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @JustinTrudeau：在维克多·欧尔班多年来的侵蚀之后，匈牙利人投票支持变革，并重新承诺维护民主制度。这是一个向世界各地民主国家发出的有力且积极的信号，表明公民可以收回机构并恢复对权利的尊重。 推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 Pakistani Army Chief Asim Munir and Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif to visit Saudi Arabia within the next 48 hours. - Geo News https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043603705199518071/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 快讯 🔴 巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔和总理夏巴兹·谢里夫将在未来48小时内访问沙特阿拉伯。- Geo News https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043603705199518071/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Philippines officials accuse Chinese-linked boats of using cyanide in disputed Spratly waters, calling it “sabotage” that could damage reefs and fish stocks. (PhilStar Global) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2043601411728900536/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 菲律宾官员指责与中国有关联的船只在有争议的斯普拉特利群岛（南沙群岛）海域使用氰化物，称其为可能破坏珊瑚礁和鱼类资源的“破坏行为”。（PhilStar Global）https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2043601411728900536/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel The IDF says it is close to capturing Hezbollah stronghold Bint Jbeil in southern Lebanon, after a major offensive led by the 98th Division. The military says forces encircled the town, then pushed in, killing over 100 Hezbollah operatives, destroying infrastructure and seizing large amounts of weapons. “Over the past week, the forces completed the encirclement and launched an offensive in the town of Bint Jbeil,” the IDF said. Operations are ongoing, with commanders estimating a few more days to eliminate remaining fighters and secure the area. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列国防军表示，在第98师领导的大规模进攻后，已接近占领黎巴嫩南部的真主党据点宾特朱拜勒。军方称，部队包围了该镇，随后进入，击毙了100多名真主党武装人员，摧毁了基础设施并缴获了大量武器。“过去一周，部队完成了包围并对宾特朱拜勒镇发起了进攻，”以军表示。行动仍在进行中，指挥官估计还需要几天时间来消灭剩余的武装人员并确保该地区安全。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Spain's Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez in China: We need China to open up so that Europe does not have to close itself. Our trade deficit with China grew 18% last year. That is unsustainable. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043600711791808514/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯在中国表示：我们需要中国开放，这样欧洲就不必自我封闭。我们去年对中国的贸易逆差增长了18%。这是不可持续的。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043600711791808514/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index United Kingdom Prime Minister says his country will not be involved in blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 英国首相表示，他的国家不会参与封锁霍尔木兹海峡。 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : http://x.com/i/article/2043430994485661697 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @TheWarMonitor：http://x.com/i/article/2043430994485661697 推文

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: As far as I can see, there is currently a sincere need on both sides for a ceasefire. Of course, there is always the Israel factor — Israel’s disruptive role here must always be taken into account. At the moment, both the Americans and the Iranians have returned home. I believe the Iranians, in particular, will evaluate the proposal made by the Americans and will give a response.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：据我所见，目前双方确实真诚地需要停火。当然，总有以色列因素——以色列在这里的破坏性作用必须始终考虑在内。目前，美国人和伊朗人都已回国。我相信，特别是伊朗人，会评估美国人提出的建议并给予回应。

text: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah announced between 01:20 and 09:45 on April 13 that they carried out rocket and drone attacks targeting the settlements of Kiryat Shmona, Doviv, and Shlomi, as well as the Matalba position. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党宣布，在4月13日01:20至09:45之间，他们对基里亚特什莫纳、多维夫和什洛米定居点以及马塔尔巴阵地进行了火箭弹和无人机袭击。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Israeli airstrike on Al Mansouri plain, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Reuters: An Israeli airstrike killed an infant girl during her father’s funeral in southern Lebanon, in the village of Srifa. The child, reportedly under two years old, was among several family members killed when their home was struck, while her sister was seriously wounded. The Israeli military said it did not have sufficient details on the incident but stated it takes measures to avoid civilian harm. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列空袭黎巴嫩南部阿尔曼苏里平原。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 路透社：以色列的一次空袭在黎巴嫩南部斯里法村的一场葬礼上炸死了一名女婴。据报道，这名不到两岁的女婴在房屋被击中时与多名家庭成员一同丧生，她的姐姐受重伤。以色列军方表示，对该事件没有足够的细节，但表示已采取措施避免平民伤害。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇶🇦 🇱🇧 MTV on the latest developments in Beirut: Qatar Airways will resume its flights to Beirut International Airport starting the morning of April 14, operating one flight per day. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇶🇦 🇱🇧 MTV关于贝鲁特最新进展：卡塔尔航空将于4月14日上午恢复飞往贝鲁特国际机场的航班，每天运营一班。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Channel 12 on the latest developments on the Lebanese front: The first round of negotiations between Israel and Lebanon is expected to take place tomorrow in an effort to reach a ceasefire and a lasting agreement. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Channel 12 on the latest developments in southern Lebanon: It has been decided to establish 15 permanent camps in the front-line area of Lebanese villages following Netanyahu and Katz’s visit yesterday to the IDF Northern Command. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 第12频道关于黎巴嫩前线最新进展：预计以色列和黎巴嫩之间的第一轮谈判将于明天举行，旨在达成停火和持久协议。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 第12频道关于黎巴嫩南部最新进展：继内塔尼亚胡和卡茨昨天访问以军北方司令部后，决定在黎巴嫩村庄的前线地区建立15个永久营地。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Channel 12 on latest developments on the Lebanese front: The army has been instructed to achieve as many targets as possible in Lebanon in case it is forced to halt operations before the start of negotiations tomorrow. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Channel 12 on the latest developments on the Lebanese front: The first round of negotiations between Israel and Lebanon is expected to take place tomorrow in an effort to reach a ceasefire and a lasting agreement. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 第12频道关于黎巴嫩前线最新进展：军方已接到指示，如果被迫在明天谈判开始前停止行动，应在黎巴嫩实现尽可能多的目标。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 第12频道关于黎巴嫩前线最新进展：预计以色列和黎巴嫩之间的第一轮谈判将于明天举行，旨在达成停火和持久协议。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 Channel 12: Hezbollah launched more than 400 rockets and 40 drones since the ceasefire with Iran, causing direct damage to 25 buildings. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Channel 12 on latest developments on the Lebanese front: The army has been instructed to achieve as many targets as possible in Lebanon in case it is forced to halt operations before the start of negotiations tomorrow. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 第12频道：自与伊朗停火以来，真主党发射了400多枚火箭弹和40架无人机，对25座建筑物造成直接破坏。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 第12频道关于黎巴嫩前线最新进展：军方已接到指示，如果被迫在明天谈判开始前停止行动，应在黎巴嫩实现尽可能多的目标。@wfwitness

text: WarMonitor Artemis II astronaut Christina Koch is greeted by her dog after returning home from a 10-day mission around the Moon. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2043596126444528070/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 阿尔忒弥斯2号宇航员克里斯蒂娜·科赫在结束为期10天的绕月任务回家后，受到了她的狗的迎接。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2043596126444528070/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ According to DeepState, Russia used the “Easter Truce” selectively in favorable areas to improve its positions. ▪️ The pause was used to evacuate wounded personnel, deliver ammunition, and conduct troop rotations. ▪️ Russian units reportedly used white flags to approach and carry out reinforcement efforts, particularly in the Hulyaipole direction. ▪️ An increase in assault intensity is expected following the end of the “truce.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：❗️ 据DeepState称，俄罗斯有选择地在有利地区利用“复活节停火”来改善其阵地。▪️ 停火被用于撤离伤员、运送弹药和进行部队轮换。▪️ 据报道，俄罗斯部队使用白旗接近并进行增援，特别是在胡利亚波列方向。▪️ 预计“停火”结束后，攻击强度将会增加。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: The Spectator Index Iran says no port in the Gulf region will be safe if its own ports are threatened, as the United States prepares to enforce blockade. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 伊朗表示，如果其自身港口受到威胁，海湾地区的任何港口都不会安全，因为美国正准备实施封锁。 推文

text: Spain's Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez in China: We need China to open up so that Europe does not have to close itself. Our trade deficit with China grew 18% last year. That is unsustainable.
text_zh: 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯在中国表示：我们需要中国开放，这样欧洲就不必自我封闭。我们去年对中国的贸易逆差增长了18%。这是不可持续的。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇩 ⚡️ U.S. and Indonesia are discussing permission for U.S. military to access Indonesian airspace . Hegseth to meet with Indonesian Defense Minister Sjafrie Sjamsoeddin today
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇩 ⚡️ 美国和印度尼西亚正在讨论允许美军进入印尼领空。赫格塞斯将于今天会见印尼国防部长沙弗里·沙姆苏丁

text: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇵🇸 Netanyahu Declares New Genocide Phase: IOF to Resume Brutal Operations in Gaza to "Disarm" Hamas Netanyahu: "Trump failed to mobilize a coalition to open the Strait of Hormuz, so he also understands that building a coalition to disarm Hamas is less realistic. We will have to do it. We will have to do it."
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇵🇸 内塔尼亚胡宣布种族灭绝新阶段：以色列国防军将恢复在加沙的残酷行动以“解除”哈马斯武装。内塔尼亚胡：“特朗普未能动员联盟来开放霍尔木兹海峡，所以他也明白建立一个联盟来解除哈马斯武装是不太现实的。我们将不得不这样做。我们将不得不这样做。”

text: Iran's Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf had impressed the American team as a “refined and professional bargainer, and potential leader of a new Iran.” Source: David Ignatius, WaPo
text_zh: 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫给美国团队留下了“精明、专业的谈判者，以及新伊朗潜在领导人”的印象。来源：大卫·伊格内修斯，《华盛顿邮报》

text: Washington Post Columnist David Ignatius: The blockade is a pressure tactic, to be sure, but not primarily a military one. Trump has no appetite for further armed conflict. He knows that the upsides are limited and the ‘tail risk’ is large. A ground attack… might lead the U.S. into a quagmire.
text_zh: 《华盛顿邮报》专栏作家大卫·伊格内修斯：封锁无疑是一种压力策略，但主要不是军事策略。特朗普没有兴趣进行进一步的武装冲突。他知道收益有限，而“尾部风险”很大。地面攻击……可能会将美国拖入泥潭。

text: Iran's First Deputy Speaker of Parliament Ali Nikzad: They had not come to take [rescue] a pilot. They had come to take something else; to take it and put it on display.
text_zh: 伊朗议会第一副议长阿里·尼克扎德：他们不是来营救飞行员的。他们是来拿别的东西的；拿走它并展示出来。

text: Open Source Intel A senior Pakistani Foreign Ministry source told Qatar's Al-Arabi Al-Jadid that Pakistani officials are working to convince the U.S. delegation to return to negotiations with Iran. Talks between Pakistani officials and both the Iranian and American delegations took place in "a positive atmosphere," with both sides still interested in dialogue. Pakistani FM Ishaq Dar spoke with his Saudi, Turkish, and Egyptian counterparts to coordinate efforts to maintain the ceasefire and reduce tensions. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 一位巴基斯坦外交部高级消息人士告诉卡塔尔《新阿拉伯人报》，巴基斯坦官员正在努力说服美国代表团恢复与伊朗的谈判。巴基斯坦官员与伊朗和美国代表团之间的会谈在“积极的氛围”中进行，双方仍对对话感兴趣。巴基斯坦外交部长伊沙克·达尔与沙特、土耳其和埃及同行进行了交谈，以协调努力维持停火并缓解紧张局势。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Cuba's President Miguel Díaz-Canel: "I have no fear. I am willing to give my life for the Revolution. Removing one person will not solve anything. There are hundreds ready to assume responsibility." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043590833379700868/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 古巴总统米格尔·迪亚斯-卡内尔：“我没有恐惧。我愿意为革命献出生命。除掉一个人解决不了任何问题。有数百人准备承担责任。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043590833379700868/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @jurgen_nauditt : The Chinese are having fun with Trump. https://twitter.com/jurgen_nauditt/status/2043402217986683246/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @jurgen_nauditt：中国人在拿特朗普开玩笑。https://twitter.com/jurgen_nauditt/status/2043402217986683246/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Cuban President Díaz-Canel responding to Trump's invasion threats: "Whoever tries to take over Cuba will collect her blood-soaked soil if he does not perish in the struggle." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043590499345261050/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 古巴总统迪亚斯-卡内尔回应特朗普的入侵威胁：“任何试图占领古巴的人，如果不在斗争中丧生，都将收集她那被鲜血浸透的土地。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043590499345261050/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump says a blockade is set to take effect as countries move to restrict Iran’s oil exports, adding tankers are rerouting to the U.S.: "At 10 o'clock tomorrow we have a blockade going into effect...other nations are working so that Iran will not be able to sell oil and that would be very effective!" "There are MANY boats heading toward our country to fill up with oil and then go and take it, so they're not going to go through the Hormuz strait and ultimately that'll be corrected." "But in the meantime, they're using us!" "We have more oil because of Drill Baby Drill, we have more oil than Russia and Saudi Arabia put together." "So if you look at Russia and Saudi Arabia, two big ones, we have much more oil than they have put together. And what's happening is boats are coming over here, filling up, we don't have to go through the Hormuz strait!" tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普表示，随着各国采取行动限制伊朗石油出口，封锁即将生效，并补充说油轮正在改道前往美国：“明天10点我们将实施封锁……其他国家正在努力，这样伊朗就无法出售石油，这将非常有效！” “有很多船只正前往我国加油，然后去运走它，所以它们不会通过霍尔木兹海峡，最终这会得到纠正。” “但与此同时，它们在利用我们！” “由于‘钻探吧，宝贝，钻探吧’，我们拥有更多的石油，我们拥有的石油比俄罗斯和沙特阿拉伯加起来还要多。” “所以如果你看看俄罗斯和沙特阿拉伯，两个大国，我们拥有的石油比它们加起来还要多。发生的情况是，船只来到这里，装满油，我们不必经过霍尔木兹海峡！” 推文

text: Iran’s Khatam al-Anbiya Central HQ Spokesperson: Security of ports in the Persian Gulf and the Sea of Oman is either for everyone or for no one. Enemy-affiliated vessels do not and will not have the right to pass through the Strait of Hormuz. Other vessels will be allowed to transit the strait in compliance with the regulations of the Armed Forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran. If the security of ports of the Islamic Republic of Iran is threatened, no port in the Persian Gulf or the Sea of Oman will remain safe.
text_zh: 伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部发言人：波斯湾和阿曼海港口的安全要么属于所有人，要么谁也不属于。敌对附属船只没有，将来也不会有通过霍尔木兹海峡的权利。其他船只在遵守伊朗伊斯兰共和国武装部队规定的情况下，将被允许通过海峡。如果伊朗伊斯兰共和国的港口安全受到威胁，波斯湾或阿曼海的任何港口都不会保持安全。

text: Cuba's President Miguel Díaz-Canel: I have no fear. I am willing to give my life for the Revolution. Removing one person will not solve anything. There are hundreds ready to assume responsibility.
text_zh: 古巴总统米格尔·迪亚斯-卡内尔：我没有恐惧。我愿意为革命献出生命。除掉一个人解决不了任何问题。有数百人准备承担责任。

text: Cuba's President Miguel Díaz-Canel: If the time comes, we’ll defend ourselves. And if we need to die, we’ll die.
text_zh: 古巴总统米格尔·迪亚斯-卡内尔：如果时间到了，我们会保卫自己。如果我们需要死，我们就会死。
